Bash(cd /c/Users/AidanKeaveny/Documents/github/helioscta-backend && python -c "
import glob, re

# Find all PJM .py files \(excluding __init__.py\)
pjm_dirs = [
    'backend/src/power/pjm/*.py',
    'backend/src/power/gridstatus_open_source/pjm/*.py',
    'backend/src/power/gridstatusio_api_key/pjm/*.py',
]
files = []
for pattern in pjm_dirs:
    files.extend\(f for f in glob.glob\(pattern\) if '__init__' not in f\)

old_utils = '''from helioscta_api_scrapes.utils import \(
    azure_postgresql,
    logging_utils,
    slack_utils,
\)'''

new_utils = '''from backend.utils import \(
    azure_postgresql_utils as azure_postgresql,
    logging_utils,
    slack_utils,
\)'''

old_settings = '''from helioscta_api_scrapes import \(
    settings,
\)'''

new_settings = '''from backend import \(
    secrets as settings,
\)'''

changed = []
skipped = []

for f in sorted\(files\):
    with open\(f, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
        content = fh.read\(\)
    
    new_content = content
    new_content = new_content.replace\(old_utils, new_utils\)
    new_content = new_content.replace\(old_settings, new_settings\)
    
    if new_content != content:
        with open\(f, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
            fh.write\(new_content\)
        changed.append\(f\)
    else:
        skipped.append\(f\)

print\(f'Updated {len\(changed\)} files:'\)
for f in changed:
    print\(f'  {f}'\)
if skipped:
    print\(f'Skipped {len\(skipped\)} files \(no match\):'\)
    for f in skipped:
        print\(f'  {f}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/AidanKeaveny/Documents/github/helioscta-backend && python -c "
import glob

pjm_dirs = [
    'backend/src/power/pjm/*.py',
    'backend/src/power/gridstatus_open_source/pjm/*.py',
    'backend/src/power/gridstatusio_api_key/pjm/*.py',
]
files = []
for pattern in pjm_dirs:
    files.extend\(f for f in glob.glob\(pattern\) if '__init__' not in f\)

for f in sorted\(files\):
    with open\(f, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
        lines = fh.readlines\(\)
    # Check if 'settings.' is used anywhere beyond the import block
    uses = [l.strip\(\) for l in lines if 'settings.' in l and 'import' not in l]
    if uses:
        print\(f'{f}: {uses}'\)
    else:
        print\(f'{f}: NO settings usage \(can remove import\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/AidanKeaveny/Documents/github/helioscta-backend && python -c "
import glob

# Only the direct pjm/ scripts have no settings usage
files = [f for f in glob.glob\('backend/src/power/pjm/*.py'\) if '__init__' not in f]

old_block = '''from backend import \(
    secrets as settings,
\)

'''

changed = []
for f in sorted\(files\):
    with open\(f, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
        content = fh.read\(\)
    if old_block in content:
        new_content = content.replace\(old_block, ''\)
        with open\(f, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
            fh.write\(new_content\)
        changed.append\(f\)

print\(f'Removed unused settings import from {len\(changed\)} files'\)
for f in changed:
    print\(f'  {f}'\)
" 2>&1)
